SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2025 JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AUGUSTUS BRENNAN. DEFENDANT BRIDGETT MOORE IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
